（……まずいな。予測よりも敵の数が多い。<br>こんなところで足踏みしたくないん:
(...this is bad. More enemies than I expected.
I don't want to get stuck here—)
そう思った矢先、モンスターの頭上へ高く跳躍した少女の姿が見えた。: Just then, a girl leaped high above the monster's head.
少女は手にした両手剣をモンスターに突き立て、大物を仕留める。<br>おぉっ、と兵:
The girl drove her greatsword into the monster, felling the massive
beast. The soldiers gasped in awe.
……フフッ。視える……視えるぞ。<br>敵をヴァルハラへ<ruby=いざな>誘<:
Fufu... I see it! The Bloody Road—the path of bloodshed that beckons
my foes to Valhalla!
組織の<ruby=フィクサー>黒幕</>に支配された<ruby=マリオネット>獣:
There's no way mere Beasts (Marionettes) controlled by the Fixer
could block my path to glory!
我が暗黒に飲まれて眠れ！ ……ククク、クハハハ！<br><ruby=つわもの>兵:
Sleep, consumed by my darkness!... Kukuku, Kuhahaha!
Warriors! Follow me! Don't fall behind!
で、でもまぁ、強いし、とりあえずついていくか……？: B-but she's strong, so maybe we should follow her for now...?
周囲に敬遠されつつも、再び娘がモンスターの頭上へ跳躍する。<br>形勢有利となり:
Though the soldiers kept their distance, the girl leaped above the
monster again. The battle turned in their favor, and the Commander felt relieved.
（……動揺もあったみたいだが、あの娘に感謝しないといけないな。<br>戦闘が落ち:
(They seemed unsettled, but I should thank that girl.
Once the battle calms down, I'll talk to her.)
疲れているところ悪いが、少しいいか？: Sorry, I know you're tired, but can I have a minute?
我の上位存在なのだからマスターだ。もっとも、この次元の其方が<br>いつまで我と:
You are my superior being, so you are my Master. How long you'll walk
the same path in this dimension is uncertain—only the gods know.
……な、なんかよく分からないが、活躍してくれた兵と話がしたかったんだ。<br>構:
...I don't really get it, but I wanted to talk to the soldier who did so
well. Is that okay?
手短に頼むぞ。戦いの後は<ruby=ダークネス>暗黒の力</>が漏れやすい。<b:
Make it brief. After battle, the Darkness tends to leak.
I can but hope to contain it.
……ッ、アアッ！ 封じている左目が疼き始めた――<br>我がマスター、話があるな:
...Ah! The sealed left eye has begun to throb— My Master, if thou
hast something to say, hurry whilst I still retain my sanity!
お前の力には秘密があって、使うとリスクがあるのか！？<br>具合が悪いなら衛生兵:
So your power has a secret, and using it has risks!
If you're not feeling well, I'll call a medic—
ちょっ……まままま、待て！ 待つんだ我がマスター！: W-w-w-wait just a moment! Wait, My Master!
……事を悪戯に大きくしたくないんだ。察してくれ。<br>用件を聞こう。:
...I wish not to make a pointless scene. Understand that.
I shall hear thy request.
我の<ruby=コード>真名</>を知りたいと？: Thou wishest to know my True Name?
……<ruby=エンジェル>堕天使</>、どう思う？ とぼけたふりをしているが<:
Pray, what do you think, 'Angel'? You feign ignorance,
but it appears you may be a henchman of the Fixer.
あぁ、あぁ……そうだな。仮初の役とはいえ、今の我は駒の１つに過ぎん。<br>刃向:
Ah, ah... yes. Though it be a temporary role, I am but a single pawn.
I shall not oppose. Here, I shall reveal only my alias.
いったい誰と話している？: Who exactly are you talking to?
それを知られると、我は其方を消すしかなくなる……: If thou learnest that, I would have no choice but to eliminate thee...
いきなり物騒になったな！？: That got dangerous all of a sudden!
未来科学に近付かれると、タイムパラドクスを誘発する。終末を防ぐためだ。<br>…:
...If one approaches the future sciences, it induces a time paradox,
preventing the apocalypse. ...Also, thou mayst call me Hield de Zieger.
おい、ヘイリー。<br>配給の非常食、忘れてたぞ。ここに置いとくからな。:
Hey, Hayley.
You forgot your emergency rations. I'll leave them here.
……んなっ！？<br>我が<ruby=コード>真名</>は特別だから気安く呼ぶな:
...Ngh! How many times must I say not to casually address me by my
True Name!
ヘイリーと言うのか。いい名前じゃないか。: So you're called Hayley. That's a nice name.
ほう……<ruby=コード>真名</>の響きに興味を示すか。其方にも資格がありそ:
Hoh... You show interest in my True Name. Perhaps you qualify to
pursue the truth of the All Cosmos hidden by the organization's Bluff.
うーーーーーん……ちょっと待て。これ以上、情報を増やすな。<br>１度、お前の言:
Uhhh... hold on. Don't throw out any more info.
Let me sort out what you've said first.
話を統合すると、お前は<ruby=ダークネス>暗黒の力</>とやらで真実のために:
So to sum up, you're fighting for the truth with that Darkness or
whatever, but there's some enemy you're on guard against.
大穴に来て戦っているということは、大穴探索かモンスターにその敵が<br>絡んでい:
You came to the Abyss and you're fighting, so that enemy is tied to
the expeditions or the monsters? ...and you want to take them down?
……ば、馬鹿な！？ 出会って間もないというのに、我が真意を――？<br>信じられ:
...N-no way! We just met, yet you've seen through my true intent?
Unbelievable! You, what's your affiliation? Whose banner do you carry?
前線基地に来る前は別の場所にいたが、今はここ以外には所属していない。:
I was somewhere else before coming to the Frontline Base, but right
now I'm not part of any other organization.
……まだ記憶が戻っていないようだな。: ...It seems your memories have yet to return.
ん？ 俺はどこかでお前に会っていたのか？: Huh? Have I met you somewhere before?
そうとも言えるし、そうとも言えない……: That is both true and not...
え、えぇと……つまり、分からないと。<br>でも会えていたらいいな、と思ってくれ: Uh, well... so you don't know. But you're hoping we might have met?
（やったぞ、合ってた！ なんだこの謎の達成感！！！）: (Yes, I got it right! What a mysterious sense of accomplishment!)
面白い！ 実に面白いぞ！ 我はとても高揚している！<br>我がマスター！ この胸:
Fascinating! Truly fascinating! I am most exhilarated! My Master!
Surely you can understand this throbbing in my chest, can you not!
コミュニケーションが成立して大変嬉しい、と言いたい？: You're saying you're really happy we can communicate?
フフフッ！ さすがだ――<br>我はついに前世との因果を結んだ様子――:
Fufufu! Just as I'd expect——
It seems I have finally formed a karmic bond with my past life——
前世で我らは唯一無二の友か、あるいは生涯に渡って戦い続けた<br>強敵だったのだ:
In our past lives, we were either irreplaceable friends or lifelong
rivals. A hero or a villain——which one, I wonder?
記憶が戻ったあとは対立するのかもしれないが<br>今は再会を祝い、同じ立場で戦え:
After your memories return, we may become enemies, but for now let
us celebrate our reunion and rejoice that we can fight as equals.
そ、そうだな。うまくやれると俺もありがたい。<br>何せお前は腕が立つ。この後の:
Y-yeah, I guess so. I'm glad we can get along. After all, you're skilled.
I'm counting on you for the rest of the expedition.
フフッ、承知した。我がマスター。いや、其方たちの規則に則って<br>これからは司:
Fufu, understood. My Master. No, by your rules, I will call you
Commander now. Tonight, I will become your sword...until we meet again.
……と、とりあえずうまくいったらしいが――<br>疲れる娘だったな……: ...Well, we managed somehow, but... what a handful she is.
ヘイリーはいつもあんな感じですよ……: Hayley's always like that, you know...
あの調子なので、話が全然通じないんですよね。<br>ちゃんと会話が成立している場:
We can't get through to her like that. First time I've seen a real
conversation... As expected of the Commander.
その言い様だと、お前たちも苦労させられていそうだな……<br>あいつと親しい奴っ:
From the sound of it, you guys have had your hands full too... Isn't
there anyone close to her?
見たことないですね。<br>そもそも、まったく人が寄り付きません。: I haven't seen anyone. No one goes near her in the first place.
いったい、どういう経緯であんなふうになったのやら……<br>装備を見るに、貧しい:
I wonder what led to her being like that... Judging by her equipment,
she doesn't seem to come from a poor background.
ヘイリーの素性を知っている者は誰もいないのか？: Does no one know about Hayley's origins?
おそらくは。尋ねた者もいるそうなのですが<br>「英雄は雌伏するものである」とか:
Probably not. I've heard some people asked, but she said something
like "A hero must bide their time" and wouldn't answer.
我が<ruby=ダークネス>暗黒の力</>に飲まれよ！ でやぁぁっ！: Be consumed by my Darkness! Hyaaah!
哀れな<ruby=ソウル>魂</>に救済を――エイメン。: May salvation descend upon these wretched spirits... Amen.
（わけは分からんが、腕は立つんだよなぁ）: (I don't get it, but she's skilled, that's for sure.)
……あまり近寄りたくないが、<br>ヘイリーのところが突破口だ！ 続くぞー！:
...I don't want to get too close, but Hayley's spot is the opening!
Follow me!
ふぅっ……無事に戻ってこられたな。今回の探索は大成功だ。<br>お前のおかげだよ:
Phew... we made it back safe and sound. This expedition was a huge
success. It's thanks to you, Hayley. Thanks.
礼には及ばない、我が司令官。モンスターを滅するのは我が一族の宿願だ。<br>その:
Spare your thanks, my Commander. Vanquishing monsters is my clan's
sworn burden. I answered the call of that karmic fate.
ふむ？<br>ということは、お前の一族はモンスター退治を生業として――: Hm? So your family's business is monster slaying—
お、おおっ……お嬢様！ ようやくお会いできました！<br>ご機嫌麗しゅう！！:
O-oh! Milady! I've finally found you! You are looking most radiant
today!
どうされました？ じいやですよ。数年前まで、お嬢様の付き人を――<br>様子を見:
What's the matter? It's me, your former attendant. I've come to check
on you at the Frontline Base.
わわわわ、分かってます！<br>分かってますから、どうか今はそっとしておいて！: I-I know, I know! So please, just leave me alone right now!
急にどうしたんだ？<br>どうしてそんなに慌てている？: What's wrong all of a sudden? Why are you so flustered?
あっ、慌ててない！ 我を怯ませるのは<ruby=パラレルワールド>多次元世界</:
Nothing can make me flinch except the Mastermind, the Fixer who
rules the Parallel Worlds. The Darkness does not waver in any hue!
……お嬢様。もしかして、また？: ...Milady. Don't tell me... it's that again?
……皆様、すみませぬ。少々、お嬢様と話がございます。<br>お嬢様、来ていただけ:
...I apologize to everyone. I have something to discuss with the young
lady. Young lady, would you be so kind as to come with me?
は、はい……<user>様、本日はこれにて……: Y-yes... Commander, I'll be going now...
（さて。今日は昨日の探索の続きだな。<br>……おっ？ ヘイリーだ）:
(Alright. Today we continue yesterday's exploration. ...Oh? It's
Hayley.)
……あ、<user>様。<br>本日もどうか、よろしくお願いいたします！: ...Ah, Commander. I look forward to working with you again today!
……えっ？<br>お前、どうした？ 話し方が昨日と全然違うじゃないか？:
...Huh? What's wrong with you? The way you talk is completely
different from yesterday!
き、気にしないでください。喋り方を変えても、<br>ちゃんと責務は果たしますから:
P-please don't mind it. Even if I talk differently, I'll still fulfill my
duties... I have to prepare for departure, so I'll go.
あ、あぁ……あんなヘイリー、初めて見たぞ。<br>いったい何があったんだろうな？:
Yeah... I'd never seen Hayley like that. I wonder what happened to

（兵士たちにも動揺が広がっている。<br>悪い影響がないといいんだが――）:
(The unease is spreading among the soldiers too. I hope it doesn't
have a negative effect...)
